posts.name: Framer 3.0
posts.tagline: With Agents, Branching, Community, and an all-new design
posts.description: Agents bring AI to the canvas to help you design, write, analyze, and organize your sites. We’re also launching Branching, a new way for teams to explore ideas before they go live, and unveiling the new Framer Community, where creators can share and earn. Together, these launches change how teams create, maintain, and scale websites. We think you’ll love it.

makers.name: Jurre Houtkamp
makers.headline: Designer & Head of Marketing at Framer

posts.name: Swytchcode CLI
posts.tagline: Give agents reliable access to 2,000+ APIs w/ durable state
posts.description: Write agent logic, and skip the plumbing. Give AI agents reliable access to 2,000+ APIs with retries, idempotency, policy enforcement, and durable state.

posts.name: Daemons by Charlie Labs
posts.tagline: Keep PRs, issues, CI, and docs moving with AI agents
posts.description: Charlie Labs gives engineering teams always-on AI daemons that keep work moving after coding agents create it. Define recurring roles in your repo, then let Daemons monitor PRs, issues, CI, docs, and Sentry errors over time. Instead of waiting for another human prompt, Daemons leave reviewable updates where your team already works: GitHub, Linear, Slack, and Sentry.

posts.name: Quartz
posts.tagline: AI email client built for focus. Runs locally on your Mac
posts.description: Quartz turns Gmail into a focused inbox. It sorts every message by importance, and learns what matters to you over time. When you reply, it drafts in your own voice. And the AI runs entirely on your own Mac, so your mail stays end-to-end encrypted and never shared with AI providers.

posts.name: Android 17
posts.tagline: Android becomes an intelligence system
posts.description: Android 17 brings AppFunctions, Android MCP, adaptive-first app requirements, App Bubbles, Continue On, stronger privacy controls, memory limits, performance improvements, and new media/camera APIs as Android starts shifting from an operating system into an intelligence system.

posts.name: Dopami
posts.tagline: Household chores without the mental load for ADHD
posts.description: Dopami helps ADHD families, adults, and roommates handle household chores without mental load by suggesting small missions based on room, time, energy, and shared home context.

posts.name: Tapfree for Chrome
posts.tagline: Voice dictation that adapts to what’s on your screen
posts.description: Typing on the web has not evolved. Tapfree fixes that. Tapfree is a voice-first keyboard for Chrome text fields and ChromeOS that lets you write messages, notes, docs, and emails by speaking naturally - without dictation errors, awkward formatting, or constant corrections. It understands context, not just words.

posts.name: Deep Work Plan
posts.tagline: Models matter. Context matters more. Give your agent a plan.
posts.description: Deep Work Plan turns any repo into a harness with the context of your best engineer — so any AI agent codes like your smartest model and can't drift from the plan. Not a chat window it forgets, a spec written into the repo: atomic tasks, acceptance criteria, validation gates, resumable state. Long runs survive context resets; any agent picks up where the last left off. Point an agent at it, walk away, come back to work you can verify. Any agent, any repo, no lock-in. Open Source, MIT.

posts.name: memi
posts.tagline: The AI agent harness for product design teams
posts.description: A macOS workbench where Claude, Codex, and Hermes run on your specs, research, and Figma files.

posts.name: Dualora
posts.tagline: Record in both 16:9 and 9:16 at the same time
posts.description: Multi-platform creators have a broken workflow: record landscape for YouTube, flip the phone, record again for Shorts. Or record once and spend 20 minutes cropping a second version that still looks off. Dualora fixes this at capture time — not in post. Open the app and you see both 16:9 and 9:16 framing live on screen while you shoot — Split View or Picture-in-Picture. Hit record. Export two files. Upload to two platforms. Done. No guessing. No re-shooting. No desktop detour. No Account.

posts.name: Typerino
posts.tagline: Screenwriting and playwriting for movies, television, stage.
posts.description: Industry-standard screenwriting and stage-play formatting for feature, television, and stage. No Markdown, no syntax: what you type is what gets exported. Mac and Windows. Free 14-day trial, then $11.99/mo, or $99/year.

posts.name: Mirlo
posts.tagline: Social media for real connections. No likes, no algorithm.
posts.description: Mirlo is a European social app for real human connection. Built without engagement hooks: no likes, no public comments, no algorithm, no infinite scroll. Mutual connections only, so the conversation stays between the people in it. Hosted in the EU, no ads, no data sold. Subscription-only, 14-day trial. On iOS across 30 EU countries with wider rollout planned. Made for the people who quietly closed the apps that stopped working for them.

posts.name: Tyto by ai-coustics
posts.tagline: Audio insight that predicts voice AI performance
posts.description: Tyto is a lightweight model that runs on your audio stream and predicts whether the audio reaching your agent will cause downstream failures. It outputs a single score plus a breakdown across six dimensions: noise, speaker reverb, speaker loudness, interfering speech, background media speech, packet loss. Try it here: https://ai-coustics-tyto-demo--ph.modal.run/

posts.name: Wolfram Language 15
posts.tagline: Computational language built for humans and AI agents
posts.description: New and updated functionality in Wolfram Language 15: LLM & AI, notebook & user interfaces, symbolic & numeric computations, visualization & graphics, geometry & graphs, astronomy, chemistry, life sciences, knowledgebase, video, PDEs & system modeling, core language, compiler & evaluation, repositories.

posts.name: Locus Founder
posts.tagline: Text an AI agent and it builds + runs your business
posts.description: Locus Founder builds and runs a whole business for you. Most AI tools only build you a landing page, Locus Founder interviews you, designs the brand, and ships a full-stack app. Locus Founder doesn't stop there; it sets up Stripe payments, sources your product, creates and publishes ads, and so much more. Locus Founder is always working in the background and pings you to approve any decisions or spending. No templates, no forms, no code. Locus Founder is backed by YCombinator.

posts.name: Redactify
posts.tagline: Automated profanity censoring for video & audio
posts.description: Bleep out swear words in your videos automatically, and blur speakers' mouths so nothing slips through. Built for creators, podcasters, and media teams shipping to TikTok, YouTube, Twitch and Spotify.

posts.name: Snapchat SPECS
posts.tagline: Powerful computer built into lightweight see-through glasses
posts.description: SPECS bring computing into the world around you, so you can learn, work, and play while staying present in the moment.

posts.name: Cilantro
posts.tagline: Watches your accounts and tells you what changed
posts.description: Connect your bank accounts once and Cilantro does the watching - odd charges, bill creep, auto-detected trip recaps, and a weekly "here's what changed." No budgets, no tagging. Works solo, better with a partner. Read-only, no ads, no data sales.

posts.name: ClawEase
posts.tagline: An AI business operator that books appointments for SMBs.
posts.description: Clawease is an AI business operator for SMBs that captures customer inquiries, checks availability, books appointments, and sends confirmations across phone, WhatsApp, and web forms. It helps appointment-driven teams respond faster, reduce admin work, and convert more inquiries into booked appointments.

posts.name: ClipDone
posts.tagline: Automatic short-form video editing
posts.description: Creating video content still takes too much work. The best marketing videos usually come from real people speaking to a camera, but manual editing is slow and expensive. It shouldn’t be easier to generate AI videos than to edit real ones. That’s why we built ClipDone. It automatically turns your raw footage into ready-to-post shorts. Just upload your footage and ClipDone edits it together, adds subtitles, b-roll, and animations.

posts.name: Vitrine
posts.tagline: Turn any photo into a beautiful wallpaper
posts.description: Vitrine lets you turn any photo into a fluted-glass desktop wallpaper on Mac. Drop in an image and refract it through vertical glass ribs for a textured look. It renders live with Metal so you see results instantly, then export at full resolution and set it as your desktop. With a simple drag-and-drop workflow, you can quickly craft unique wallpapers from your photos.

posts.name: MCP 2000
posts.tagline: AI Drum Machine MPC in your browser
posts.description: MCP2000 is an AI-powered MPC that lives in your browser. Type what you want to hear ("dusty boom bap kit with crunchy snares," "8-bar afro-house shaker loop at 120 BPM") and it generates the samples, drops them onto a 4x4 pad grid, and lets you finger-drum, chop, sequence, and add effects. No crate-digging, no plugins, no install. Just prompt, play, and build a beat.

posts.name: AudienceCue
posts.tagline: Turn YouTube comments into cited insights and a report
posts.description: Download every comment from any YouTube video, channel, or playlist, then turn them into an AI report — audience signals, sentiment, and content ideas. Every insight links back to a real public comment you can verify. Free to start.

posts.name: PaneFlow
posts.tagline: Let AI agents build real animated slideshows
posts.description: PaneFlow now ships an MCP server, so AI agents like Claude and Cursor build real animated slideshows for you - laid out, on-brand, and exportable to code, video, or PDF. Every result is a real, editable project you own. Plus a rebuilt editor and 50 new templates.

posts.name: Henji
posts.tagline: AI replies that are trained to sound like you
posts.description: Henji turns your half-formed thoughts into a finished reply that sounds like you — not a generic AI. Most AI tools think for you and hand back text in their voice, so you rewrite it anyway. Henji is the opposite: you keep the thinking, Henji just handles the writing. Select a message, drop a few keywords, and get a reply in your tone — ready to send. The more you use it, the more it learns your phrasing, your rhythm, your emoji habits. Starts with Slack. Built for anyone drowning in replies.

posts.name: NotchSpace
posts.tagline: Turn your Mac notch into an intelligent active workspace
posts.description: NotchSpace turns the Mac notch into a controllable workspace layer. It has three core features: a quick app launcher for instant access, a menu bar manager to clean and rearrange your top bar, and a temporary workspace for dragging and moving files, text, links, and colors between apps. Everything is intentional—you choose what enters the space. No auto-capture. Built natively for macOS with SwiftUI. Fully local, no tracking or uploads.

posts.name: SuperGoal
posts.tagline: World cup in your menu bar
posts.description: The little Mac app that keeps World Cup 2026 in your menu bar. Live scores, every fixture, groups and your favorite teams, and custom themes.

posts.name: idmly
posts.tagline: Turn any HTML/CSS design into an editable InDesign file
posts.description: idmly converts a self-contained HTML/CSS design into a native, editable Adobe InDesign file. Real text frames, named paragraph styles, charts as editable vectors. Not a flattened PDF. Works with any CSS framework. First two pages free, $49 lifetime, no subscription.

posts.name: BrainFlow
posts.tagline: Turn your rambling thoughts into coherent notes
posts.description: Tap record, say what's on your mind, and get back a real note: clean headings, key points, next steps. No typing, no tidying. Export to Notion or email to yourself.

posts.name: Parano.ai
posts.tagline: Never miss a competitor's move
posts.description: AI-assisted competitive intelligence for teams that play to win. Parano.ai tracks everything your competitors do, then tells you what it means and what to do about it, saving you hours of research every week while educating your whole team on your market.

posts.name: Spanly
posts.tagline: See what AI agents do inside your MCP server
posts.description: Soon, more agents than humans will use your product via MCP. Spanly gives you full observability on the MCP server you ship: error rates, session traces, latency, client analytics, deploy alerts. Drop-in CLI or SDK. US & EU data residency. Built for SaaS engineering teams shipping MCP in production, alongside the Datadog, Sentry, or New Relic you already run.

makers.name: Tim Quinteiro
makers.headline: Founder of Spanly: Observability for MCP

posts.name: Restaurant Menu Visualizer
posts.tagline: Share the menu with Ava and see what each dish may look like
posts.description: Sometimes you go to a restaurant, take a seat at the table, start reading the menu and then... "What even is this? Too many French terms. I don’t even know what I should order." You’ve been there, right? That’s why I built this feature, so Ava could show me what a dish may look like, without asking the waiter. Ava is not fully baked yet, so when you talk to her, she may say stupid things. It's all part of growing up.

posts.name: SolonGate
posts.tagline: Zero-trust security gateway for AI agents
posts.description: AI agents don't just chat anymore; they execute. SolonGate is the zero-trust security layer that controls exactly what your autonomous AI agents can do. We sit directly between LLMs and your internal systems, APIs, or databases. Every action your AI attempts is filtered through our deterministic Policy Engine and an isolated AI Judge. We block risky, unauthorized, or destructive actions before execution. Complete action governance.

posts.name: StickerWords
posts.tagline: Learn new words from the world around you
posts.description: StickerWords turns the world around you into a language lesson. Snap an object, food, sign, or anything nearby, and instantly learn its word in your target language. Each word is saved to your personal vocabulary list with example sentences and spaced repetition reviews, so you don’t just learn it once. You actually remember it!

posts.name: Docfarm
posts.tagline: Host, share, and track everything your AI builds
posts.description: Docfarm catches every artifact your AI builds through MCP, hosts it at a clean link, and tracks who opens it. HTML, PDFs, decks, anything. No more zipping files or screenshotting Claude outputs to share. Capture is automatic, so every piece lands in one place. Share it with your team and work on it together, all from the same farm. Most AI work lives in personal accounts and walks out when someone leaves. Docfarm keeps it on infrastructure you own. Your AI tool ships it, Docfarm plants it.

posts.name: TapSign
posts.tagline: Send, sign & manage documents easily
posts.description: TapSign stands out by removing the biggest pain point in eSignature tools: ongoing subscriptions. Unlike most platforms that lock users into monthly fees, TapSign offers optional lifetime access so businesses can pay once and own their document workflow long-term. It combines legally binding eSignatures, real-time tracking, audit trails, team collaboration, and secure storage in one simple dashboard, making document signing faster, more affordable, and more ownership-focused.

posts.name: Wario Synth
posts.tagline: Transform songs into retro Gameboy-style game console music
posts.description: Wario.Style turns any song into a Game Boy-style chiptune, right in your browser. Type a song title and it searches BitMidi for the MIDI, then synthesizes it live through four authentic chiptune channels: two pulse, one wave, one noise. No signup, no server render. Export as WAV or MIDI and share with a link that previews the track. The catalogue runs deep on classics, so throw it something timeless. Can't find it? Upload your own MIDI and hear it in 8-bit.

makers.name: andy
makers.headline: deep frontier ai tooling. music, agents

posts.name: Wilson
posts.tagline: AI coworker in Slack that builds reports, work tools, + more
posts.description: Wilson is the AI coworker who lives in your Slack and does the actual work, not advice, finished files. Ask in a thread and he builds the report, dashboard, deck, internal tool, or code, then drops it right back in the chat. He connects to your real everyday tools (Stripe, HubSpot, GitHub, Meta & Google Ads…), pulls the real numbers himself, asks before anything risky, and never trains on your data. Named after a certain volleyball. Far more useful. 🛟

posts.name: Infinite
posts.tagline: OS runtime unifying GA4, PostHog, + Stripe into a local db
posts.description: Your growth data is trapped in too many dashboards that don't talk to each other. Infinite pulls GA4, Meta, PostHog, + Stripe into one place on your own machine. Now you can finally ask one question across your whole stack and connect the dots: how traffic, signups and revenue move together. Data is stored locally + never leaves your machine. Open source, bring your own LLM, use Claude or Codex.

posts.name: Polygram Coding Agent
posts.tagline: AI-native coding assistant that helps developers in any IDE
posts.description: Polygram IDE Agent is an AI-native coding assistant that helps developers plan, design, code, and edit products directly inside their IDE. Unlike traditional coding assistants, Polygram uses intelligent multi-agent workflows and smart model routing to dynamically select the best AI models and agents for maximum token efficiency, speed, and output quality. It plugs directly into VS Code, Cursor, and Antigravity along with visual editor for frontend developers.

posts.name: Easyparser
posts.tagline: Real-time Amazon scraper - data API
posts.description: EasyParser is a real-time Amazon data API that delivers product details, prices, offers, seller info, and search results as clean structured JSON in a single request. No IP blocks, no CAPTCHAs, no hidden credit multipliers. Geo-targeted data by ZIP or country, bulk requests up to 5,000 URLs, and built-in auto-retry keep your pipeline running without babysitting. Start free with 100 credits. No credit card required.

posts.name: AirTrackBot • Flight Deals
posts.tagline: Find unusually good flight deals with AI
posts.description: Find flight deals from your city, often 30–60% below typical prices. Use flexible search, AI-powered filters, and price alerts to spot better fares.

posts.name: Fireply AI 2.0
posts.tagline: AI Agent for organic X (Twitter) growth
posts.description: Grow your X following with AI-powered replies. Persona-matched, context-aware engagement that sounds like you. Real-time data context, 24/7 autonomous work. 40 free replies, no credit card required.

posts.name: Jurisynk For Small Practices
posts.tagline: A Harvey for Small Practices now available in free tier.
posts.description: Jurisynk is a Harvey/Legora-like AI legal workspace built for small practices, chambers, boutique firms, and independent lawyers. Unlike generic AI tools, it combines legal drafting, review, redlining, research, document repositories, workflows, email. - 20+ Million Judgements Dataset - Secure - Affordable For corporate, disputes, litigation & in-house practices. Use smart tabular reviews, deal room analysis, chronology, data visualiser & collaborate with your team & end client.

posts.name: Clinch
posts.tagline: Break the scroll. One mindful moment per app open.
posts.description: A ~15s mindful moment between you and Instagram, TikTok, and the apps that pull at you — breath, puzzle, fact, rotated so it never gets stale. Then it asks: what brought you here? Pro ($1.99/mo · $14.99/yr · $39.99 lifetime): unlimited apps, all 6 interceptors, Coach (patterns → one-tap blocks), hard-block scheduler. iOS 17+. No account, no cloud — stays on your phone.

posts.name: anny AI
posts.tagline: Phone agent for bookings beyond FAQ & appointments
posts.description: anny AI turns customer calls into confirmed bookings. It answers questions, checks live availability, collects the right details, and books directly in anny. Unlike generic voice bots or calendar schedulers, it supports complex real-world flows for services, spaces, activities, events, and courses — including multiple locations, dynamic prices, add-ons, direct bookings, and payment links via SMS or WhatsApp. It's natively built in, without complex setup.

posts.name: Consent AD
posts.tagline: The authenticity of humans. The speed of AI.
posts.description: Consent.ad is the first two-sided AI photo marketplace. Brands generate on-model, on-brand campaign photos in seconds using verified human profiles. Models license their likeness once and earn royalties every time their face is used. No studio. No agency. No waivers. Every face in our catalog is a real, consenting human with payouts. Built on Gemini 3 Pro for photoreal output. 7-day free trial, 120 credits, no card required.

posts.name: KINETK API
posts.tagline: Real-time multimodal intelligence API for AI agents
posts.description: The web isn't text anymore. It moves through clips, images, and screenshots. KINETK maps all of it into one shared 15B+ vector space, connected as a live graph of creators, communities, and narratives. Query it by API or MCP. Credit-based pricing, no token guesswork. (promo code: https://platform.kinetk.ai/login?ref=PRODUCTHUNT)

posts.name: Amulet
posts.tagline: Live AI adventures with narration, choices, music and sound
posts.description: Most interactive audio products are fixed stories or branching audiobooks. Amulet generates the adventure live as you play, so each run can develop differently. It combines narrated AI storytelling with choices, music and sound effects, then adds screen-off, hands-free play through earbud controls. It is closer to a live audio adventure engine than a prewritten audiobook.

makers.name: Amulet Games
makers.headline: Live AI audio adventures in your pocket

posts.name: SnackPro.ai - Scan food for allergy risk
posts.tagline: Scan food for allergens before you eat
posts.description: SnackPro helps people scan food with AI to detect possible allergens before they eat. It also gives a broader safety and dietary view from one scan, including high sugar, sodium, saturated fat, pregnancy-risk foods, vegan, kosher, halal, and more. Results can be shared with family or nutritionists.

posts.name: UniversalMigrator
posts.tagline: Legacy code migration triage across 113 languages with AI
posts.description: Migration triage for legacy codebases in 113 programming languages, powered by the Claude API. GUI and CLI. Scores migration difficulty, flags risky constructs, and drafts target-language conversions — so you know what you're dealing with before the rewrite starts.

posts.name: Hold My Lid
posts.tagline: Keep your Agents running while your macbook is closed
posts.description: Start your agents, close your MacBook, and put it in your bag. Hold My Lid will put your Mac to sleep once the agents finish their tasks.

posts.name: ConsentScope
posts.tagline: See what websites do before you consent.
posts.description: ConsentScope is a powerful tool for automatic GDPR compliance auditing. Instantly detects whether a website sets cookies, writes to localStorage, or loads third-party scripts before you give consent.

posts.name: MacAutocomplete system-wide autocomplete
posts.tagline: System-wide, on-device AI autocomplete for your Mac.
posts.description: MacAutocomplete offers system-wide, on-device natural-language autocomplete for macOS, enhancing your typing experience in any application. A subtle, greyed hint appears at your cursor, which you can accept by pressing the Tab key. This tool runs entirely on your local machine, ensuring complete privacy as no data leaves your Mac. It utilizes a local language model that learns your writing style over time, providing increasingly personalized suggestions.

posts.name: DearHiringManager.io
posts.tagline: Find the real decision maker behind any job post
posts.description: Paste a job post URL and find the actual decision-maker behind the role: name, work email, and LinkedIn in about a minute. Direct outreach can make you 2× more likely to get an interview invite. One free lookup per day.

posts.name: Loktra
posts.tagline: The AI that answers from your data, not the internet
posts.description: Most "AI for data" tools either query your database or read your docs. Loktra does both in one question and cites the exact row and PDF page behind every answer. Grounded, audit-logged, role-based access. Built for SaaS teams tired of waiting days for answers their tools should already deliver. Try free today.

posts.name: Ritmo — daily giving, one tap
posts.tagline: Turn $1 a day into giving you'll actually stick to.
posts.description: Most giving is one big donation a year, then nothing until next December. Ritmo flips it. You pick a cause, give $1, and you're done in under a minute. Tomorrow you do it again — and that's the whole point. Small, daily, sustainable. No guilt, no grand gestures, no savior stuff. Just the bare minimum, done often. And every dollar is traced to a real, verified outcome: our AI reads each nonprofit's own tax filings to work out exactly what your $1 does. Receipts, not vibes.

posts.name: SnapZia-Screenshot Manager
posts.tagline: Screenshots, Screenshot Manager
posts.description: SnapZia automatically organizes your screenshots the moment you take them — no manual sorting, no cloud uploads, no account needed. Powered by on-device ML (Google ML Kit), it detects and categorizes screenshots into Recipes, Invoices, Travel, Shopping, Conversations, and more. OCR search lets you find text inside any screenshot instantly. Everything runs locally on your device. Your data never leaves your phone.

posts.name: Finy
posts.tagline: Powerful money management without the price tag
posts.description: Finy is a budgeting app that's powerful and genuinely simple to use, the opposite of dense, pricey tools. It categorizes your spending, keeps your budgets current, and gives you full control when you want it. Open it and know where you stand in seconds. $4.99/mo. iPhone and iPad.

posts.name: Numeris Ledger
posts.tagline: Real-time bookkeeping & tax for freelancers
posts.description: Managing freelance finances shouldn't require an accounting degree. Numeris Ledger is a real-time financial command center built for modern independent consultants and solopreneurs. Securely connect your bank via Plaid to unlock instant automated expense tracking, automated bookkeeping, and real-time tax intelligence so you’re never caught off guard. Plus, get total cash flow clarity with our "Safe-to-Spend" dashboard. Say goodbye to spreadsheet chaos and tax anxiety for good!

posts.name: Coloriboo
posts.tagline: Turn memories into coloring pages
posts.description: Turn your favorite family memories into one-of-a-kind coloring pages. Upload a photo, pick the detail level, and print at home - or order a real printed book delivered to your door. Start free with 2 credits.

posts.name: Finy
posts.tagline: Powerful money management without the price tag
posts.description: Finy is a budgeting app that's powerful and genuinely simple to use, the opposite of dense, pricey tools. It categorizes your spending, keeps your budgets current, and gives you full control when you want it. Open it and know where you stand in seconds. $4.99/mo. iPhone and iPad.

posts.name: AxioPlan
posts.tagline: Project estimation that recalculates live on the call
posts.description: Agency estimation still lives in a spreadsheet. Static, offline, wrong and rebuilt every time a client changes their mind. AxioPlan replaces it. Build PERT-backed estimates with t-shirt sizes and risk levels, then open it in the client meeting. Adjust scope, team size, or deadlines live - P50/P85/P95 delivery dates recalculate in real time. Walk out with a cost breakdown by epic and role, built live in the room. No follow-up email. Close on the call.

posts.name: Ekagra
posts.tagline: Block Reels & Shorts. See where your attention goes.
posts.description: Most focus apps guilt-trip you or lock you out. Ekagra does neither. Starts with awareness — Reels scrolled today, when your attention slips, and weekly trends. No judgment. Just the number. Seeing it is enough to change it. You choose what's next: scheduled focus blocks, a calm pause on Reels/Shorts, or just track. Every feature is optional. → Blocks Reels & Shorts, not the whole app → On-device. No account, no data collection → Free. 4.7★ | 1K+ downloads

posts.name: OpinionDeck
posts.tagline: Finds people complaining about your competitors on Reddit
posts.description: OpinionDeck finds people actively complaining about competitors or asking for alternatives on Reddit. Discover leads, draft personalized outreach, and stop cold messaging strangers.

posts.name: CafeWork
posts.tagline: Walk in. Work. Pay after.
posts.description: You know the feeling — the awkward stare at a cafe after you've emptied your coffee an hour ago, wondering if you've overstayed your time at a table. Cafework fixes that. We turn your favourite cafes into proper remote work spots — with full transparency on wifi, plugs, vibe, and whether you're actually welcome. Walk in knowing what to expect. Work alongside others. Pay after. No membership, no awkwardness. We're here for community within cafes and remote work.

posts.name: Askio.cloud
posts.tagline: AI command center for infrastructure operations
posts.description: Manage server inventory, monitoring, browser access, approvals, and Ops resources with Askio's AI infrastructure command center.

posts.name: The Masthead
posts.tagline: World news, rewritten by AI in your language
posts.description: Read the world's news in your language. The Masthead uses AI to translate, summarize, and read news aloud — from any RSS feed or podcast. Wake up to a daily audio briefing tailored to you. Free to start, Premium unlocks unlimited translations and AI deep-dives.

makers.name: Dmytro Bohdanov
makers.headline: Founder of The Masthead — AI news app

posts.name: CastReader — AI Explain
posts.tagline: Listen to articles, Kindle & PDFs — and understand them
posts.description: CastReader reads web articles, Kindle & PDFs aloud in natural voices — and explains the hard parts as it reads. Read & Explain turns dense passages into plain language and marks up the page like a tutor with a highlighter, so you don't just hear it, you get it.

posts.name: Meeedly Time Converter
posts.tagline: Easily convert any time to multiple time zones in seconds
posts.description: Meeedly Time Converter is a simple, real-time world clock built for clarity and speed. Unlike traditional time zone tools that feel cluttered and complex, Meeedly lets you instantly check any country’s current time, compare multiple locations side-by-side, and convert time across several zones in one view. No sign-up, no setup, no confusion. It’s free and designed for fast global coordination, making it easier for remote teams, and businesses to understand time across the world instantly.

posts.name: VerifiedDR
posts.tagline: Find out if your Domain Rating is Fake
posts.description: Discover, track, and compare websites by Domain Rating and traffic. Submit your site, climb the leaderboard, and explore top domains across AI, directories, and marketing.

posts.name: DataCloser
posts.tagline: AI-powered B2B lead engine for French-speaking markets
posts.description: DataCloser is an AI-powered B2B lead generation platform for French-speaking markets. It scans the web in real time to discover companies, verify decision-maker emails, score leads with AI, generate personalized icebreakers, and send built-in email outreach campaigns — all without switching tools. Built for agencies, consultants and sales teams in Belgium, France, Luxembourg & Switzerland. GDPR compliant. Free credits on signup.

makers.name: Jordan Baivier
makers.headline: Founder of DataCloser · B2B leads AI

posts.name: Interdatum CRM
posts.tagline: Interdatum CRM is an all-in-one operating system for SMB's
posts.description: Interdatum CRM is an operating system for small-medium service businesses that are looking to streamline their intake pipeline. Through Interdatum CRM you can generate dynamic intake forms for your website and automate the generation of estimates, collection of deposits, and invoices. KitchenOS is a AI WhatsApp bot that sits between flatmates and their cook. Flatmates text or voice-note meals. Cook receives the meal plan as text + voice note in Hindi, Kannada, or English. That's a 95% verified success rate across 500,000+ stores. When nothing works, we say so. No fake codes, no rankings you can pay for.

posts.name: Nadir

OpenAI-compatible, BYOK, two-line change.

posts.name: Hilka — Thought Chains
posts.tagline: Build trail of your thoughts and make correct decisions
posts.description: Track and improve your thinking with a tree of thoughts: -Branch. Kill some node and it stays as a struck-through tombstone carrying the reason you killed it -Honest status. Every card is todo/doing/done/dropped, a truthful picture of where the decision actually stand -AI-native. Via a remote MCP server, any assistant (Claude, ChatGPT, Codex) can build or prune the tree

posts.description: If you run multiple AI coding tools (Claude Code, Codex, Hermes, OpenClaw, OpenCode, GitHub Copilot, Kimi), you're probably flying blind on how much you're actually spending. AI Spend Tracker reads session data from every agent's local storage and shows you the big picture.

posts.name: Clinic Guard
posts.tagline: Stay audit-ready. Track every credential, automatically.
posts.description: Clinic Guard tracks CAQH ProView per provider, HIPAA, OSHA, DEA, radiology certs and payer credentialing for small dental clinics. Automatic alerts before anything expires. Audit PDF in 3 seconds. 14-day free trial. No card required.

posts.name: Duma Icons
posts.tagline: Design Tools, icons, tech, svg, react, png, icon
posts.description: Browse 451 hand-drawn, open-source icons across 15 categories. Recolor, resize, copy the SVG or download — free for React and any framework.

posts.name: Booklex: Read & Learn Languages
posts.tagline: Read foreign books. Tap any word. Build your vocabulary.
posts.description: Stuck at B1-B2? Your vocabulary stops growing because your brain skips unknown words when context is enough. Booklex fixes this: → Read EPUB/PDF books in any language → Tap any word - instant translation, no app switching → Words save to your dictionary automatically → Review with flashcards, quizzes and tests → Fully offline. 50 languages supported. I'm an iOS developer who built this while learning Spanish. Read books you enjoy, learn words in context, grow your vocabulary naturally.

posts.name: Lumo Light Meter
posts.tagline: Spot & matrix light meter built for film photographers
posts.description: Most light meter apps are ports of digital logic slapped onto a phone camera. Lumo is different, I built it from the ground up for the analog workflow. Shoot spot or matrix, matched to your actual film camera body, with a hold-and-capture flow that lets you lock a reading, recompose, and compare values across a scene before you ever touch the shutter. The interface is designed to disappear.

posts.name: World Quest Kids
posts.tagline: A warm, playful geography app for kids 3 to 12
posts.description: Most kids' geography apps drill flashcards or bury kids in grown-up menus. World Quest Kids treats geography the way kids play, curious and story-first. Scratch-map passport, not a quiz: visit 195 countries, scratch gold foil off, hit milestones. Each country opens up into real facts, a hello-greeting, alphabet, and an Animal World. Age-bucketed folktales plus toddler-to-tween games, all in one app (3–12). Kind by design: no streak-shaming, no dead-ends, no fake "fun facts." Built solo. iOS

posts.name: Partyto

posts.description: Partyto is a party gaming platform where you can play solo or with friends on a single phone. No downloads needed—enjoy daily challenges and fun games perfect for parties, hangouts, and dinner gatherings.

posts.name: Again
posts.tagline: Recurring tasks that start when you finish
posts.description: Again is a tracker for the recurring real-life stuff that doesn't fit a to-do app or a calendar: the haircut, the AC filter, the dentist, the vitamins. The trick is dynamic recurrence. A Loop's next due date keys off when you actually finished, not a fixed day ("haircut every 5 weeks", counted from the last one). Three modes (Loops, Dailies, Tallies), one tap to log. Local-first and account-less, so it works fully offline with no login, and the everyday app is free. On iPhone and Android

posts.name: ContinuumNexus

Built for teams who want simple, straightforward monitoring without the complexity and cost of enterprise observability platforms.

It even runs on locked-down office PCs with no admin rights. Free on the Microsoft Store.
